Thus, the net result in the case of Chandradhi Yoga Is that the
Moon's strength Is boosted not only by the beneficial aspect he receives
from the benefic planet placed In the ?t" from him but also by the
beneficial strength he gets by being surrounded by beneficial Influences.
The principle that the planets placed in the 611\ and the gt" influence the
house or planet etc.. from which they are so placed is not our innovation.
The principle is recognised by no less an authority than the great Varaha
Mihi' Acharya. who has stated in Sloka:·
Chak.rasya poorvaparabhagageshu krooreshu soumye$hu cha keetafagne
Kshipram vinasam samupaihijatflaha papairvlagnasthamayabitascha.
He opined that early death is brought about.• inter alia, by malefics
